Class CoreConfigParser

java.lang.Object
dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.CoreConfigParser
public final class CoreConfigParser extends Object
Core configuration parser for the Registermaschine.

This class handles the initialisation and parsing of the core configuration XML files, instruction sets, and default condition macros. It ensures thread-safe single initialisation of the core configuration.

It provides:

  • Loading of the main configuration file
  • Parsing of default and custom instruction sets
  • Loading and parsing of core condition macros
  • Support for post-configuration parsers
  • Optional custom root path for user-editable files

All XML parsing is validated against internal DTDs. Missing files are either copied from resources or a ConfigurationParseException is thrown for critical failures.

Since:
1.0.0
Author:
TiJ

  • Method Details

    • init

      public static void init(dk.tij.registermaschine.api.config.IConfigParser... postConfigParsers) throws dk.tij.registermaschine.api.error.ConfigurationParseException
      Initialises the core configuration.

      This method parses the main configuration file, applies internal parses and optionally applies post-configuration parsers provided by the caller.

      Parameters:
      postConfigParsers - optional parsers to execute after internal configuration parsing
      Throws:
      dk.tij.registermaschine.api.error.ConfigurationParseException - if any parsing or I/O errors occur

    • init

      public static void init(boolean onlyInternal, dk.tij.registermaschine.api.config.IConfigParser... postConfigParsers)
      Initialises the core configuration with an option to skip external files
      Parameters:
      onlyInternal - if true, only internal resources are loaded; no user-editable files are copied
      postConfigParsers - optional parses to execute after internal configuration parsing
      Throws:
      dk.tij.registermaschine.api.error.ConfigurationParseException - if any parsing or I/O errors occurs

    • parseDefaultInstructionSet

      public static void parseDefaultInstructionSet(dk.tij.registermaschine.api.instructions.IInstructionSet set) throws dk.tij.registermaschine.api.error.ConfigurationParseException
      Parses the default instruction set into the provided IInstructionSet.
      Parameters:
      set - the instruction set to populate
      Throws:
      dk.tij.registermaschine.api.error.ConfigurationParseException - if parsing fails

    • parseInstructionSet

      public static void parseInstructionSet(String fileName, dk.tij.registermaschine.api.instructions.IInstructionSet set) throws dk.tij.registermaschine.api.error.ConfigurationParseException
      Parses a specific instruction set XML file into the provided IInstructionSet
      Parameters:
      fileName - the instruction set XML filename
      set - the instruction set to populate
      Throws:
      dk.tij.registermaschine.api.error.ConfigurationParseException - if parsing fails
      IllegalStateException - if the core configuration has not been initialised

    • addListenerToTarget

      public static void addListenerToTarget(String target, dk.tij.registermaschine.api.config.IConfigEventListener listener)
      Adds a configuration event listener to a specific parser target.
      Parameters:
      target - the parser target name
      listener - the listener to register

    • setCustomRootPath

      public static void setCustomRootPath(Path customPath)
      Sets a custom root path for user-editable configuration files.
      Parameters:
      customPath - the root path
